column2: 固化 DrissionPage 4.2 beta 依赖约束
column3: 让项目依赖声明明确要求 DrissionPage 4.2 beta，并让 uv.lock 与 pyproject.toml 的 root metadata 一致。
column4: owned: pyproject.toml; uv.lock | read_only: .workflow/roadmap.md; README.md; CLAUDE.md
column5: pyproject contains drissionpage>=4.2.0b3,<4.3; uv.lock contains drissionpage 4.2.0b3; uv.lock root requires-dist specifier is >=4.2.0b3,<4.3; uv lock --check passes
column6: Preserve existing pyproject multi-line dependencies format. Existing dirty pyproject diff is formatting only; do not revert it. No new dependencies. Keep Aliyun index and mypy dev dependency.
column7: Read TASK-001.json first. Use apply_patch for pyproject edit. Recalculate lock with uv lock --upgrade-package drissionpage --prerelease if-necessary-or-explicit or compatible fallback. Write summary to .workflow/scratch/20260514-plan-P1-drissionpage-42-dependency-api/.summaries/TASK-001-summary.md.
column22: {"id":"TASK-001","status":"completed","findings":"已将 pyproject.toml 的 DrissionPage 直接依赖约束固化为 drissionpage>=4.2.0b3,<4.3，并通过 uv lock --upgrade-package drissionpage --prerelease if-necessary-or-explicit 重算 lock。uv.lock 中 drissionpage 包版本为 4.2.0b3，root package metadata requires-dist specifier 已同步为 >=4.2.0b3,<4.3。未新增依赖，Aliyun index 和 mypy dev 依赖保持不变。uv lock 期间出现上游包无效 specifier >=3.6, 的规范化 warning，但解析与 check 均通过；uv.lock 当前为 Git ignored 文件，但本地内容已更新。","files_changed":["pyproject.toml","uv.lock",".workflow/scratch/20260514-plan-P1-drissionpage-42-dependency-api/.summaries/TASK-001-summary.md"],"verification":["Select-String -Path pyproject.toml -Pattern '\"drissionpage>=4\\.2\\.0b3,<4\\.3\"' passed","Select-String -Path uv.lock -Pattern 'name = \"drissionpage\"' passed","Select-String -Path uv.lock -Pattern 'version = \"4\\.2\\.0b3\"' passed","Select-String -Path uv.lock -Pattern 'specifier = \">=4\\.2\\.0b3,<4\\.3\"' passed","uv lock --check passed"],"error":""}
